use_cases: Processing one-time payments for digital products or services
Collecting subscription payments in SaaS applications
Handling order checkout in e-commerce storefronts
Enabling secure payment method selection with visual feedback
Displaying itemized purchase amounts with discount fields
ai_summary: A glassmorphism-styled checkout card component featuring a translucent backdrop blur effect, payment method selection tabs (card, PayPal, Apple Pay), and animated hover states with glow effects. The component manages payment method state, displays purchase amounts, and uses Framer Motion for smooth mount animations. Ideal for e-commerce checkout flows, SaaS subscription pages, and fintech payment interfaces requiring a modern, premium visual aesthetic.
